name: Marketing Short-Form Clips
description: Single-pass LLM producer: takes a long-form video transcript or a topic and plans 3-5 short-form vertical clips (30-60s each) for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Instagram Reels. Output: per-clip storyboard + shot list + platform-tailored upload copy. Cutting is manual (CapCut, Final Cut) or future vertical-clipper microservice.
author: mchatai-labs
